It was hard to sleep last night so I am very tired . This morning I feel mentally drained and do not want to go to work tonight . My body feels very tired as well , my shoulders and feet are in a lot of pain .

I am feeling good . At work excited for tonight’s shift . it will be busy and I am ready for it . I don’t feel as tired anymore since I got to work . Everyone else is in a good mood so I am too . Staff meal was good so that helped

My body is sore from yesterday and my shoulders are killing me . I don’t have to work so I am in a good mood . I ate really late last night so my stomach hurts . I am just somewhat tired but I feel calm and happy that I have a day off to relax

I feel better than last week because yesterday was my day off . I have time to mentally relax and prepare for the week . I am not looking forward to working an extra day at the restaurant but I need the money so .

I am exhausted from working late last night . I am opening today at my second job today . Was difficult to fall and stay asleep last night . Feeling very sluggish today . I have to close again so I am anxious about that because I am so tired

I am feeling less tired than earlier this morning . I have a little more energy going into my shift . I also feel a little less anxious about my upcoming work shift tonight . Overall pretty neutral though

I am tired and having anxiety feeling very anxious . I am off today so that is helpful . I am a little jittery feel unable to relax . My head feels empty which is causing more anxiety . I will most likely drink today .

I am exciting because I am off tonight . I am going out . I will be drinking but I do not have an urge to drink . It’s a special occasion . I am happy and calm and peaceful for not having to go into work tonigh

I drank too much last night and I have anxiety and am very uncomfortable . I have to work both jobs today I’m exhausted . I have such bad anxiety and the thought of going into work sucks . Jittery and tired and anxious

I had a good day at my first job . Had a cup of coffee feeling good more energized . My anxiety has gone away . I am ready and feeling energized for my closing shift at the restaurant . Anxiety is like a 2 compared to a 7 this morning

Just finished my night shift . I am tired but I have a lot of energy . It was a good shift no annoying customers . Easy Friday excited to go home . I am hungry and ready to go home and get into bed . I hate having late dinner though

I’m excited today because I am moving . I’m at my baseline for anxiety and feeling nervous as well as stressed . I do have to opne the restaurant today so that is bothering me because I want to pack and move but overall happy

I’m at work had a good morning I feel energized and excited and ready to get Saturday over with . I am not anxious or nervous . I’m sure I will crash sooon but for now I am in a great mood . No jitters or baseline anxiety is low

I am so happy to be at work right now . What an easy night I had . I loved work tonight . Small section good tips no reason not to be happy . No anxiety and I don’t feel like drinking but I might have some wine

I’m moving today and my family is here helping me so that is exciting . I don’t have to work the restaurant it’s closed Sunday . I do have my second job at 3 which is annoying since I have to move but I feel fine excited

I’m going into work my second job right now I forgot I picked up a shift moved all morning nervous about my new apartment I’m also exhausted and hate that I have to work again all week starting to resent the restaurant t

I just finished work I am feeling pretty exhausted mentally and physically . I just want to go to sleep but I have a million more this to do . Feeling anxious about next week but I’m ahead on work for my non restaurant job so that helps

I am exhausted I packed and moved all night and had to work in between that . I am emotionally drained from personal stuff however my anxiety is pretty low I’d say a 3 . I’m headed into work now than off tonight so that’s good

I feel fine I’m out to eat with my friends I don’t have   to go into the the restaurant tonight since they are closed . I didn’t work this morning at my second job but it wasn’t bad I only saw a few patients . I have to finish moving tonight I nervous

I’m sad I am moving out and going through a breakup and haven’t been able to take a day off . I have so much stuff and it’s taking me forever to get everything out of my old apartment . I’m just wxhausted

I’m exhausted we had a front of the house work meeting early today . So I was in two hours before start time and had a quiz I’m still in the middle of moving it just tired . Now I have to work the whole shift I’m kind of annoyed today

I don’t really feel anything not happy or sad or nervous . I don’t have any energy I am very tired I guess that is all I feel right now . Shift is almost over it was a slow night not a lot of tips bc it is raining and my next two days are super busy so I’m just blah

I’m pretty neutral feeling right now . I am at my first job of the day . I have to open the restaurant which I normally close so I get a break in between so that’s annoying . I’m fine though my normal amount of exhaustion

I’m feeling fine overall . I moved more thing into my apartment between shift . I am at work now had to open alone that was a pain but whatever . The warm weather is making everything feel better so I’m not mad or happy just fine

We were shorted staff and it was nice outside so it was so busy I had a huge second I was in the weeds the whole time plus I worked this morning I’m just literally exhausted and I have to finish moving by tomorrow everything sucks I want to go to bed

I have a headache and I’m kind of tired but I have the night off from the restaurant so I’m in a good mood . Yesterday was so busy so I need a little time off . It’s freezing so that’s annoying but overall I have happy anxiety is pretty low

I’m fine I’m still at work stressed because we are getting a snow storm soon . I have to finishing moving and I’m out of time . I’m just exhausted and really would love to have one full day off . Anxiety is low I’m more annoyed than anything else

I’m moving I’m tired and I’m sad . I’m going through a bad breakup I’m exhausted I haven’t had a full day off in like two weeks . I’m stressed because I don’t know what to do with my cats anxiety is like a nine right now \ n

Im cold it snowed I just had to clean my car off so i don’t know I don’t really feel anything . Really wanted to drink last night was very stressed out and sad but I didn’t do that feels good . Im just over the winter time . I got paid today so I feel a little better about busting my ass all week

I’m just feeling a little bit anxious right now . I was a little late for work which shouldn’t matter but since I’m supposed to be getting a promotion all eyes are in me . Plus is snowed it was only 7 minutes I couldn’t find Parking I had to interview someone at . Y other job like I’m just busy and exhausted

It’s busy at work right now . I took a minute to hide in the bathroom bc it was so hectic . I’m fine though full of energy no anxiety really I don’t really have a second to have anxiety so that’s good I think I’ll have a drink tonight though

I don’t feel anything . I slept pretty well last night I did have a few drinks so maybe that helped me sleep a little easier . I have a long day ahead of me closing the restaurant than I am off Sunday I’m planning to sleep all day

I had a wake to go to before work today so that wasn’t great , very upsetting . Anxiety was very high of course . Going into work soon for the closing shift . Than I am off tomorrow which is nice . I don’t really know how to feel at the moment

I don’t know what I’m feeling I’m busy but the night was a blur this was the first second I stopped since we opened . Today kind of sucked so whatever I’m jsut happy I get to sleep in tomorrow I do feel a little on edge but it’s fine

I’m exhausted I have a head ache I wish I didn’t drink as much as I did plus I mixed things so I’m not feeling to great . It’s my first full day off in like two weeks and I have to finish moving so I’m just tired

I’m good I have energy and I’m in a good mood for the most part . My anxiety is low but I am spending a lot of money trying to move into my new place so I’m nervous I’ll need pick up more shifts and have no days off again

I am not really feeling any emotions right now maybe a little sad but my normal exhaustion I need like a week of sleep anxiety is pretty low maybe a 4 overal a relatively nice day off no complaints just pretty baseline emotion wise

I’m at my non restaurant job this morning which is annoying because I really just need a day to sleep in . I’m all done moving so that is exciting but I’m just like very very exhausted . No anxiety or feelings of being nervous

I just left work I’m drained it was an exhausting day I had a lot of patients to see . I’m glad I don’t have to go into the restaurant tonight I just need a good nights sleep that’s all but like mentally physically drained

I’m cleaning a little I don’t really know what I feel . Just like content fine I’m probably sad but I took a little nap so that helped I have so much cleaning in this apartment to do I get some extra days off this week so that will help my mood

I’m my usually exhaustion I just moved so I’m not sleeping well it’s a little creepy being in a new place . I was late to work today so now my whole day is behind . I’m closing the restaurant tonight I’m praying it won’t be busy but I’m sure it will be whatever I’m just tiewd

It’s a busy night at work I am kind of anxious and nervous I’m not sure why . I think I had too much caffeine . I’m still tired I’m starting to make mistakes . I’ll probably have one drink tonight I sleep better

I’m exhausted but in a good way , I’ve been exercising before work to try and calm my anxiety . Work is like busy but steady I have a second right now to do my survey . I’m always sad but I’m going through a break up so

I just woke up I had a few drinks last night but I feel fine . I have to work today but not until 5 . I haven’t drank in a while so I got a little buzzed but nothing too crazy . I don’t really have any anxiety right now

I’m good jsut went to pottery switched my shift so I’d have more time in the morning to get things done . So I am closing tonight but who cares . I’m usually off so this is an extra shift I needed the money

I got attacked by a cat . I’m tired work is steady busy this is usually my day off but I needed the money so whatever . I’m jsut stressed in my normal life I guess it’s a good escape to be extra busy so I don’t mind that I picked up a shift

I’m sad but it’s fine , going it o work today I’m opening so hopefully I won’t be there too late . It’s getting way busier though but I need the money I guess . I’m exhausted last night wasn’t busy just long .

I’m fine at at work now opening going to be a busy night but it’s whatever . Went to the gym this morning so that helped with anxiety it is Friday I might drink tonight but I’m not sure yet we’ll see how the day goes

It was a good shift I feel good is actually have alot of e energy it was so busy but I didn’t really care . I do think I’m going to drink tonight but I’m not sure yet because tomorrow is going to be even busier

Just woke up I didn’t drink after work but I had a beer when I went home , like half a beer I didn’t actually finish it . I’m tired but I’m going to go to the gym before work . It’s going to be insanely busy tonight

I’m tired I ran errands today and spent too much money . Eating now before work bc I won’t eat again until probably midnight . I really don’t feel like working tonight it’s going to be so busy , also training a lot of new people is draining

It was pretty steady and busy . I’m exhausted my back is killing me I trained someone tonight but they did a good job so they were actually helpful . Everything was fine I’m going out tonight after work

I went out last night after work with co workers we went to the bar than a friends bow I drank quite a bit . I feel fine though might need a nap later n anxiety or anything yet but who knows . Also no work until Tuesday so that’s good

I’m exhausted I was out for like two days straight . I regret drinking that much but whatever . I’m off today so I’m going to relax and do some cleaning . I’m having a lot of anxiety feelinn very anxious

I’m exhausted I’m tired I drank for two days in a row which was stupid . I got in an argument with someone from work over something stupid . I’m just sad I’ve been in bed all day which is whatever I have work tomorrow

Weird vibe at work today . Got in a fight with ORG sous chef drinking over the weekend so that’s kind of uncomfortable , had a bad panic attack last night so I’m just overall exhausted mentally and physically but work should be slow

Just tired at work today , I had a huge section it was way busier than expected so I had 8 full hackers with liken two turns and I was so drained from yesterday but whatever it’s slowing down now so I’ll be fine

I’m up early I didn’t drink last night I actually got out of work early and went to bed at a normal time . This week is just going to be rough , but I’ll be fine . Work is actually a good escape these days

I’m off today , I’m going to the gym than I have my art class and than I have dinner with my grandma at the place I work . Should be a nice little day I’m also going to do some laundry and clean my apartment stuff I have been putting off . I’m good though

I didn’t work today . I did go out to dinner with my grandma so that was cute . I’m just doing chores and watching tv . I feel content I’m not really nervous or jittery . I had a glass of wine with dinner but that’s it

I literally just woke up . I overslept I was supposed to be up earlier and get some stuff done before work but whatever . I haven’t been sleeping well at all not sure why . I’m not in the mood to go to work but it’ll be fine

I’m fine I guess . I’m at work now I opened today with someone else so it wasn’t as much work . I ordered food so at least I ate something before my shift . Going to be a busy night we have an extra server   though so it’ll be all okay

I just get sad randomly I never know when it’ll happen . I am going through a break up . I love the people I work with but like I wish I had more weekend time that I wasn’t at work . It’s so hard to have a normal life

In the past twenty four hours I have been feeling very very tired , and a little stressed . I am in my first semester of nursing school , and just started a new job . I just feel tired all the time and have a lack of social life .

I have been feeling very happy . I have also been feeling very high energy . I have also been feeling more positive . Overall I am feeling very very good . I have been making sure to drink a lot more water which I believe helps

I fell asleep early and forgot to set my alarm for for . So then I woke up late and I was already supposed to be at work the time I had woke up . So then I had to rush to work and was one hour late thank goodness my boss is nice and let me slide on this one

i am still feeling the same as i was yesterday ; sad for my friend . i had a nice meal last night and was able to spend some time on myself yesterday which made me happy . i would like to be more productive on my days off .

I’m feeling Happy anxiety overwhelmed all at once happens when I am waiting to hear an answer but being hopeful for some good news . Also thinking postally on the news I’m waiting on with good positive results and outcome for my future .

I am feeling energetic planning on attending the gym for a spin workout class . After the gym I am heading home to get ready to go to brunch with a bunch of friends . I’m very excited \ n about that .   Catching up and eating yummy food seems to be what excites me now on a Sunday
I’m getting ready to going to dinner with my boyfriend I’m hungry And excited to get dressed up and do my makeup .   Then we are meeting with friends for drinks in GPE   should be a fun evening
Tired ! had a nice meeting friends for dinner . Then I did some shopping at ORG for a new blender to do some smoothies for breakfast on the morning . I am feeling a little hopeful loosing some weight

I’m feeling very excited I started planning a fun birthday week . We are going to GPE  and GPE . I am excited to be planning outfits excursions and places to see and go . This will be my first time visiting both places

I’m feeling hungry . Getting dressed now to go to the grocery store . Tonight’s dinner will be lemon shrimp scampi .   After dinner we plan on watching a movie . I’m excited for dessert as well . Just looking forward to a relaxing Sunday doing pretty much nothing

I feel tired . I had a nice shrimp scampi dinner . Dinner was delicious . We watched reruns of tv shows after dinner .   For dessert we had special donuts with frosting . Today was a long day I am ready to go to bed and relax

I’m feeling energetic . I have a spin class later on this morning .   I am hoping I get some energy after the class .   I am going to go grocery shopping for the week after the class . I like to get everything out the way

I’m feeling hungry and tired .   I’m going to make myself a chicken salad bowl for dinner and I will prep for a few more days .   Once I’m going doing that I will take the dogs out for a walk . It’s still chilly out I look forward to warmer weather

Tired . I had a long day cooked dinner and went to the gym with a intense workout . I got a lot done today which makes me feel good I got a lot accomplished . I’m going to walk my dog and head to bed early tonight .

Not feeling well today .   I woke up to horrible stomach cramps , so today I will take An easy . During the day , because this evening we are going to a play to see pretty woman . I have not   seen this play before .

Excited I’m going with my boyfriend to see a broadway play tonight . This is my first time so I am very excited for that . First we are going to have dinner . My first time getting dressed up in a long time

I’m feeling active watching a broadway play . There is an intermission . I had a nice steak dinner earlier . I going home to bed , I am so tired from all the festivities today . I really enjoyed so far . Haven’t done things like since before covid .

I didn’t sleep well last night so I am feeling very tired this morning .   Once I feel better I am going to shower and get ready to clean the upstairs .   I need to accomplish something today to feel better about myself .

Feeling productive just got done cleaning the bathroom hopefully I can finish cleaning the upstairs fully spring cleaning .   Then I am cooking steak for dinner so I am excited for a yummy meal . I haven’t had steak in while so I’m already hungry for dinner .

I’m actively organizing my kitchen . From the spices to putting the plates in order and to make everything consistent . I’m getting new kitchen cabinets so I’m organizing everything until they come in .

Getting ready . Just got done doing my hair , I still have to do my makeup and find a outfit I actually like .   Meeting an old college friend I haven’t seen in 10 years for lunch .   I’m pretty excited about today .

Getting ready to cook dinner .   I placed an order to have the food delivered .   I am making salmon with rice and broccoli for dinner , with after dinner cocktails . Then excited to watch a movie later on tonight with a bunch of old friends .

I am so exhausted from the day I had . I meal prep and went to the gym and got an amazing workout in and after went shopping at the mall got summer clothes . I had a very active day . I am on chill mode and going to bed early .

I woke up not feeling well . Today I am I am feeling very lazy .   I am going to order food to be delivered . Even though I hate paying the extra fee to have delivered . After breakfast I will take a shower and just relax until I feel better and not push myself .

I’m really not doing to much right now . I’m still on bed not feeling well .   It sucks when you don’t feel good and you want to do things and you can’t . I will take an easy today and have a fresh start tomorrow . I’m going to take a bath hopefully I will feel better .

I am feeling a little better . My boyfriend is over he is making me homemade chicken soup , hopefully that makes me feel better .   Tomorrow I have my nieces birthday party u hope I am feeling better for that . The weather is a good so that is a good sign .

I am having a delicious breakfast with my best friend . I am having we are finally seeing each other .   After breakfast we are getting relaxing massages and heading to the nail salon . Fun relaxing girls day . It’s still cold so I will probably stay home tonight .

I’m currently waiting on triple a since my car battery’s died . The only plus to waiting around is that the weather is absolutely beautiful today . I think now we will be doing takeout for dinner versus cooking at home . Hopefully dinner is good then going home to relax .

I just got home from having dinner . I am so full and tired . I woke up extremely early this morning so I am definitely feeling exhausted now . So I am going to find a good movie and probably fall asleep pretty soon .

I am doing a full spring cleaning today i am doing one room at a time . You never realized how quickly dirt adds up . Once I get the full spring cleaning finished I am cleaning my closet .   Sort out the close and get rid of .

Currently watching a thriller movie . Today has been a chill day not doing too much . There is a lot I have to do today and I have not done much at all . Tomorrow is a new start to the week . We shall see .

Currently watching a movie . The movie is pretty long . It’s almost over as long as the movie was I truly enjoyed which I normally don’t watch movies . Thinking of going to the store for dessert after the movie .

I’m not really doing much right now . I just went and got myself a coffee , so I’m sitting down finishing it . After I’m don’s I may do a workout routine to keep myself busy . It’s raining today I will probably stay in .

Driving to the car lot to pick up my boyfriend’s car we’ll he is driving . his car broke down yesterday so it’s finally fixed . Heading to dinner after getting the card in the mood for something yummy . Thinking of getting NORP tonight .

Getting ready to take a shower .   I have to help my friend read scripts for her acting class later on tonight . Something I don’t like to do at all but I am being a great friend helping . Not sure what I am doing tomorrow .

I woke up late today . I am sitting around having a coffee . I am thinking of what I want to eat for breakfast today . I am trying to go the healthy route the next couple of weeks . I am trying to loose 15 pounds for my birthday in July . If I put my mind into it I can do it .

I’m cleaning at home . I’m trying to tackle one task at a time . I’m trying to do a very deep cleaning . It’s like you start one project and you go to the next . My boyfriend is making dinner tonight . I’m happy I don’t have to do that .

Just got down cooking dinner . I’m laying down relaxing .   I’m probably going to just watch a movie or show . I’m not really in the mood to do much tonight . Tomorrow I plan on doing some shopping for the house .

Getting ready to pick my friend up . I have to pick up my friend from the car lot and kill some time while she gets her car fixed . I am going to go to the outlets with her . Hopefully we find some good shopping finds . Then go out for lunch later .

Just got done shopping . I’m sitting in my car finishing a coffee from ORG .   I have ally more organizing to do at home probably do that . After my boyfriend is making baked chicken dinner sounds good .

Getting ready to take bath . I’m so tired I did slot of errands today . After that I will probably find a good movie and go to bed early . The robot vacuum is helping me clean . I’m thankful I don’t have to do that part of cleaning .

I’m reading different articles on a healthy cleanse something I can actually follow through on more than an hour . After doing this I am going for a run and then I will come home to get ready for work .

Just got done studying my new cleanse to see what I need to eat and drink and what I shouldn’t .   My boyfriend is making fish for dinner tonight . Today is day one of my cleanse and I feel great so far which is a good feeling to have starting something new .

Currently looking for a pair of sneakers online . Can’t decide on the kind or color I want to jog and do every day errands in . After this I will head upstairs and prep for tomorrow and get clothes ready .

I got dressed and ready for my run . I am currently having breakfast now . I think after breakfast and my run I will do some decor house shopping . I like to go to thrift stores also it’s just a long day digging to find goods .

I’m feeling energetic I went to the gym I did a couple miles this morning . I organized the bathroom closet . Now I am getting ready to prepare dinner . It’s also Friday so that makes me happy . Not sure what I am doing tonight yet . It’s also raining .

I am feeling happy . I went to a charity event today . It was a lot of fun and lots of funds were raised which makes me very happy . I am so tired I am looking forward to going to bed now . I am starting vacation next week it gives me something to look forward to .

I started boxing up clothing in my house to pack . I keep catching myself over pack things I no longer need . Many sentimental memories that are just hard to throw away priceless items . I am moving along though .

Just landed in GPE for vacation .   I am very happy to be in GPE although it looks like raining weather all week .   I look forward to working out outside and think nice walks on the beach .   The ocean is so beautiful here compared to back home :

I just arrived in LOC  GPE . Just had the most delicious steak dinner .   It came with sweet potato’s . I am very tired from flying all day . I am looking forward to getting a good nights sleep . I would like to go to the beach early .

I very happy on vacation mode .   Went for a five mike walk today . We walked to a wonderful breakfast place on the island . Soon we will be walking back up the hotel to enjoy the sun until the rain comes . There is a lot of rain showers .

I just went on a walk on the beach . Relaxing now . Figuring out what to do for lunch today . After lunch I most likely will take a nap I feel so tired but I am truly enjoying myself which is so important for my mind body and soul .

I am still enjoying vacation . Also today is my anniversary with my boyfriend . We just had the most amazing NORP dinner in LOC  . Looking forward to my pajamas and going to sleep Early again . The sun really tires you out .

I just had the most amazing breakfast . We had breakfast at the hotel we were going to walk a few miles . So we decided let’s have a convent morning and stay .   I am going to try getting less sun today before I have too much .

Quite " is an intensifier that means "really ," "completely ," "rather ," "exceptionally ," or "actually ". It ' s used to add strength to an adjective or adverb , but not as much as "really " or "very ". For example , "Blue jays are quite common in this area " means that blue jays are noticeably common , more common than you might expect . \n

Calm means free from agitation , excitement , or passion . Here are some ways to describe something as calm : 
 
Serene : A calm , peaceful , or tranquil state . When used to describe people , it can suggest dignity , composure , and graciousness . When used to describe nature , it can suggest mellowness .

Sadness is an emotion that can be described as a feeling of unhappiness , sorrow , or grief . It can also be characterized by feelings of loss , disappointment , helplessness , or despair . When someone is sad , they may withdraw from others , become lethargic or quiet , or cry

Feeling calm is a mental state of peace and quiet , free from agitation , excitement , or disturbance . It can also be described as a state of serenity , tranquility , or peace . When you feel calm , your body may experience the following physical changes : Lowered heart rate , Reduced blood pressure , Decreased feelings of anger and frustration \ n
Active , Awake , Mobile , Energetic , Agile

Feeling alive is a state of being that involves experiencing the full range of human emotions , including hopes , fears , and losses . It can also mean being present in the moment , and being fully engaged in the things you do

Feeling neutral is a calm , measured emotion that can mean feeling indifferent , nothing in particular , or a lack of preference . It can also mean being impartial , unbiased , or disinterested . Some say that feeling neutral can help you : Detach from a situation , See things more clearly , Think more creatively , Make better decisions , and Move forward \ n
